brand.name: PUCMM Bookstore
brand.university: Pontificia Universidad Católica Madre y Maestra
brand.subtitle: PUCMM · Dominican Republic

footer.blurb: Digital bookstore for the academic ecosystem of the Pontificia Universidad Católica Madre y Maestra. Curated selection, transparent service, and a commitment to reading as a university practice. Each purchase supports library projects and reading culture at PUCMM.
footer.legal: Academic project — Web Avanzada. Demo content and branding; not an official university service.

home.heroTitle: Books chosen for rigorous study and purposeful reading.
home.heroBody: Built for the PUCMM community: a curated catalog, clear pricing, and a space where teaching, research, and personal reading meet.
home.missionQuote: We believe attentive reading is part of academic excellence. This bookstore brings students and faculty editions that deserve time, debate, and return.
home.missionFootnote: Proceeds symbolically support library initiatives, lending, and access to books on PUCMM campuses.
home.topicsDesc: Quick links to the catalog—same titles, filtered by genre or discipline.
home.recentError: We couldn’t load the catalog. The API may still be starting.

catalog.label: Catalog
catalog.title: All titles
catalog.intro: Search by author or title, or narrow by discipline. Inventory updates as new editions arrive.
catalog.emptyHint: Try another keyword or browse by subject above.

cart.paypalSdkLoadErr: Could not load the PayPal SDK.

cart.paypalCaptureErr: Could not confirm the PayPal payment.
cart.paypalMissingToken: Missing PayPal token in the return URL.

orders.label: History
orders.title: Your orders
orders.empty: You have not placed any orders yet.

auth.loginSubtitle: Use your registered email and password.
auth.loginAsideBody: Sign in to save lists, track orders, and shop with your account for the {{university}} community.
auth.loginAsideFoot: Secure session · Encrypted credentials · No third-party ads
auth.registerAsideBody: Create your account to shop, review orders, and get notices of new arrivals at {{name}}.
auth.registerAsideFoot: One account for the entire academic catalog.

unauthorized.title: Restricted area
unauthorized.body: This section is for administrators only. If you believe this is an error, contact support.

admin.usersLoadErr: Unable to load users. Confirm ADMIN session.
admin.ordersHint: Global list of orders from all customers.
